pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor to supply 2 Water Cooled Chillers, each with a capacity of 300 TR.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Chiller compressor type must be Screw Compressor.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 4.2

pqr_criteria.criteria: Chiller refrigerant must be R-134a, including the first charge.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 4.2

pqr_criteria.criteria: Chiller evaporator and condenser must be Shell & Tube type with SS 304 tubes.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 4.2

pqr_criteria.criteria: Approved makes for Water Cooled Screw Chillers are Kirloskar, Kehem’s, or Train.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 5.0

pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor to supply 1 Induced Draft Cooling Tower sized for a 760 TR refrigeration load.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 4.3

pqr_criteria.criteria: Cooling Tower basin, casing, and louvers must be made of FRP. Fill and eliminator to be PVC.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 4.3

pqr_criteria.criteria: Cooling Tower must be designed for a Wet Bulb Temperature of 29°C and an outlet temperature of 33°C.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 4.3

pqr_criteria.criteria: A chemical dosing system for the Cooling Tower is required.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 4.31

pqr_criteria.criteria: Approved makes for Cooling Towers are Advance cooling towers, Paharpur, Encon, Thermal care, or M square.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 5.0

pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor to supply 1 Double Skin Air Handling Unit (AHU) with a capacity of 53000 CFM.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 4.4

pqr_criteria.criteria: AHU must deliver outlet air at 22°C +/- 2°C and 45% +/- 2% relative humidity.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 4.4

pqr_criteria.criteria: AHU must include a pre-filter section with 10-micron filters and a Plug fan with VFD.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 4.4

pqr_criteria.criteria: AHU drain pan, cooling coil tubes, casing, and header must be made of SS 304. Coil fins must be plain aluminum.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 4.4

pqr_criteria.criteria: Approved makes for AHU are Edgetech, Citizen, Zeco, or System Air.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 5.0

pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor to supply 3 Chilled Water Pumps (2 Working + 1 Standby) and 3 Condenser Water Pumps (2 Working + 1 Standby), each set suitable for a 600 TR load.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 4.5, 4.6

pqr_criteria.criteria: All pumps must be centrifugal type with mechanical seals, have Cast Iron casings, SS impellers, and EN8 shafts.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 4.5, 4.6

pqr_criteria.criteria: All pump motors must be IE-3 efficiency rated, TEFC, with Class F insulation.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 4.5, 4.6

pqr_criteria.criteria: Approved makes for Pumps are KSB, SULZER, KIRLOSKAR, WILO, WILFLEY, or GRUNDFOS.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 5.0

pqr_criteria.criteria: A PLC-based control system is required. Approved makes are Allen Bradley, Honeywell, or Schneider.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 5.0

pqr_criteria.criteria: The system requires transmitters for flow, pressure, level, and temperature from the approved vendor list (e.g., Yokogawa, E&H, Emerson).
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 5.0

pqr_criteria.criteria: The main electrical power supply will be 415 V / 50 Hz / 3 Phase. All equipment must be suitable for this supply.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor's scope includes the full Design, Engineering, Supply, Installation, Testing, and Commissioning of the complete system.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 1.0

pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor's construction scope includes building foundations for all equipment and a PEB shed for the Chiller and AHU.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 7.0

pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor must perform pre-commissioning (Hydrotest, Pneumatic test, etc.), commissioning, start-up, and a Guarantee Test Run (GTR).
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 8.0

pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor must provide a separate cost for a 1-year Operation and Maintenance (O&M) service contract.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 9.0

pqr_criteria.criteria: The project site is located at Plot- K1, Taloja MIDC Road, MH 410208.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: The site area classification is Safe, dust-free, and non-hazardous, but may have ammonia present in the atmosphere.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General
